zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
Solana/美元整体呈现震荡偏弱格局，价格运行在71附近，短线反弹动能不足，市场多空博弈加剧，尚未形成明确趋势突破，整体仍处于整理阶段。

均线方面价格略低于SMA20=71.27，短期均线压制明显；MACD为负值显示动能偏空，空头力量占优但尚未出现明显放量，趋势延续性不足。

支撑位关注70.30一线，若跌破或进一步回踩69.80区域；上方阻力集中在71.30-71.50区间，需有效放量突破才能打开上行空间。

交易建议以区间思路为主，高抛低吸操作为宜，未突破71.30前不宜追多，可在支撑附近分批轻仓试多，同时严格设置止损控制风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
against the US dollar is in a mild consolidation phase with a slight upward bias over the past 24-hour period, yet price action remains capped below the 20-period simple moving average at 71.266. The latest price of 70.87 shows hesitation as bulls fail to secure a breakout above dynamic resistance. Overall structure remains neutral to slightly bearish with sellers still active overhead.

Momentum indicators point to weakening bullish pressure. The MACD reading at -0.22574503 remains below the zero line, suggesting bearish momentum is still present despite short intraday recoveries. With no RSI value available, short-term strength is harder to quantify, but price behavior indicates mid-range equilibrium rather than overbought conditions. Lack of a signal line reading limits confirmation, keeping directional conviction modest and inconsistent bias.

Immediate resistance is clustered around the 71.2–71.3 region, aligning with the SMA(20) at 71.266, which is currently acting as a key pivot level. A decisive break above this zone could open the path toward 72.5 and potentially 73.0 in extension. On the downside, initial support sits near 70.3, followed by a stronger floor around 69.5, where buyers previously stepped in.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy unless a breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near the 70.3 support zone with tight risk management below 70.0 to avoid breakdown exposure. Alternatively, a confirmed daily close above the SMA(20) would strengthen bullish continuation signals toward higher resistance levels. Until then, caution is warranted as momentum remains mixed and conviction limited overall in current market conditions.
